query:
ALTER TABLE workshops 
ADD COLUMN instructorName VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER description,
ADD COLUMN workshopDate DATE NULL AFTER instructorName,
ADD COLUMN startTime VARCHAR(10) NULL AFTER workshopDate,
ADD COLUMN endTime VARCHAR(10) NULL AFTER startTime,
ADD COLUMN duration VARCHAR(50) NULL AFTER endTime,
ADD COLUMN venue VARCHAR(500) NULL AFTER duration,
ADD COLUMN totalCapacity INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER venue,
ADD COLUMN bookedCount INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER totalCapacity,
ADD COLUMN earlyBirdPrice INT NULL AFTER price,
ADD COLUMN earlyBirdDeadline DATE NULL AFTER earlyBirdPrice,
ADD COLUMN imageUrl VARCHAR(500) NULL AFTER earlyBirdDeadline;
